wip_soft_limit_hint: You already have many tasks in progress (soft limit {{limit}}). You can still drop here — maybe finish one first?
kanban_welcome_line: Collapse columns if you need focus. Moving one card beats staring at ten.
column_hint_ideas: Capture without pressure — not everything must become a task.
column_hint_planned: You’ve committed to yourself. Next step is finding the time.
column_hint_doing: What you’re actually moving. Be gentle with your WIP.
column_hint_finishing: Close the loop — shipping beats starting another thing.
column_hint_done: Done counts. Let it be visible.
